name: Jungle Interior
politics: No single authority holds the jungle interior.
Guides, tribes, undead, monsters and hidden factions all claim small territories.
culture: Stories are carried by guides and hunters rather than maps.
Leaving offerings at old stones is common among those who know better.
rumours: The jungle moves paths when it wants people lost.
A singing ruin can be heard after rain.
A hunter saw a dead man walking with gold in his hands.
dmSecrets: A hidden trail leads toward a larger ruin network.
The jungle reacts to bloodshed near sacred stones.
A recurring animal messenger may be more than natural.
